mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score (student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{score}, #{examType}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time FROM score
SELECT id, student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time FROM score WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT id, student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time FROM score WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT id, student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT id, student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND exam_type = #{examType}
SELECT id, student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time FROM score WHERE exam_type = #{examType}
SELECT id, student_id, course_id, score, exam_type, create_time, update_time FROM score WHERE score < 60

SELECT sc.id AS scoreId, sc.score, sc.exam_type, sc.create_time AS scoreCreateTime, s.id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, s.gender, s.phone, c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, c.hours FROM score sc INNER JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.id = #{scoreId}

SELECT sc.id AS scoreId, sc.score, sc.exam_type, sc.create_time AS scoreCreateTime, s.id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, s.gender, s.phone, c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, c.hours FROM score sc INNER JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sc.score DESC

SELECT sc.id AS scoreId, sc.score, sc.exam_type, sc.create_time AS scoreCreateTime, s.id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, s.gender, s.phone, c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, c.hours FROM score sc INNER JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY sc.score DESC

SELECT sc.id AS scoreId, sc.score, sc.exam_type, sc.create_time AS scoreCreateTime, s.id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, s.gender, s.phone, c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, c.hours FROM score sc INNER JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id ORDER BY sc.create_time DESC

SELECT sc.id AS scoreId, sc.score, sc.exam_type, sc.create_time AS scoreCreateTime, s.id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, s.gender, s.phone, c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, c.hours FROM score sc INNER JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.score < 60 ORDER BY sc.score ASC

SELECT sc.id AS scoreId, sc.score, sc.exam_type, sc.create_time AS scoreCreateTime, s.id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, s.gender, s.phone, c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, c.hours FROM score sc INNER JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.exam_type = #{examType} ORDER BY sc.score DESC

SELECT (@rank := @rank + 1) AS rank, s.id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, cr.name AS className, sc.score FROM score sc INNER JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN class_room cr ON s.class_id = cr.id, (SELECT @rank := 0) r WHERE sc.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY sc.score DESC

SELECT (@rank := @rank + 1) AS rank, s.id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, cr.name AS className, sc.score FROM score sc INNER JOIN student s ON sc.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN class_room cr ON s.class_id = cr.id, (SELECT @rank := 0) r WHERE sc.course_id = #{courseId} AND s.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY sc.score DESC
